description: Lac operon from Abasy Atlas: LacI and CRP regulons, lac promoter, allolactose inducer, and target genes (lacZ, lacY, lacA) with activation/repression edges.
name: Lac Operon (Abasy-sourced)
notes: V6 = Abasy only. Lac regulon: LacI/CRP, lac promoter, allolactose; regulon–gene edges from Abasy E. coli network.
mermaid:
graph TD
    LACTOSE[Lactose]
    ALLO[Allolactose]
    LACI[LacI regulon]
    CRP[CRP regulon]
    PROM[lac promoter]
    LACZ[lacZ]
    LACY[lacY]
    LACA[lacA]
    LACTOSE -->|inducer| ALLO
    ALLO -->|relieves| LACI
    LACI -->|repression| PROM
    CRP -->|activation| PROM
    CRP -->|activation| LACI
    PROM --> LACZ
    PROM --> LACY
    PROM --> LACA
    style LACTOSE fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style ALLO fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style LACI fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style CRP fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style PROM fill:#51cf66,color:#000
    style LACZ fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style LACY fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style LACA fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: Abasy Atlas v2.2 E. coli lac regulon; promoter and allolactose from meta-curated network.

sources.title: Abasy Atlas
sources.note: Meta-curated bacterial regulatory networks; lac regulon.
